statement: Anthropic Agent Skills is an open cross-platform standard (adopted by OpenAI Codex/ChatGPT) using a single portable SKILL.md format — solving cross-agent portability by convergence rather than by build-time fan-out, with no templating/security-validation layer.

evidence.quote: We've published Agent Skills as an open standard for cross-platform portability (Dec 18, 2025).
Format released as open standard Dec 2025; OpenAI adopted the same format for Codex CLI and ChatGPT.

falsifier: Evidence OpenAI/others did NOT adopt the Skills format, or that Skills require per-platform recompilation rather than being read natively.
